title: ResearchOutput
description: A research output (publication, contribution, etc.) in the HKBU Scholars Pure Web Service API. Derived from the real Pure API 5.35.0 OpenAPI contract.

pureId.description: Pure database ID of the object; prefer using the UUID if present.

uuid.description: UUID, the primary identity of the entity.

modifiedBy.description: Username of the user that performed a modification.

modifiedDate.description: Date and time of last modification.

portalUrl.description: URL of the content on the Pure Portal.

previousUuids.description: UUIDs of other content items which have been merged into this content item.

version.description: Used to guard against conflicting updates.

title.description: Title of the research output (localized string container).

type.description: Classification reference for the research output type.

category.description: Classification reference for the research output category.

language.description: Classification reference for the language of the output.

managingOrganization.description: Reference to the managing organization for this output.

contributors.description: Contributors (persons / author collaborations) associated with the output.

typeDiscriminator.description: Discriminator identifying the concrete research output subtype.
